current_revision.goal: Turn a broad pricing topic into a concrete short-form breakdown
problem_statements: buyers do not understand why the premium tier exists
current_revision.content_objective: Show how anchor tiers reduce price shock
current_revision.freshness_rationale: SaaS teams are revisiting pricing in a tighter market
research_hypotheses: premium anchor tiers increase perceived plan value
success_criteria: viewer can explain why the middle plan feels safer
current_revision.expert_take: Anchor tiers work best when the middle tier genuinely solves the customer's primary problem
non_obvious_claims_to_test: Premium decoys increase perceived value of middle tier
genericity_risks: Generic framing without proof weakens the argument
